title: My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic #1
author: Katie Cook
description: Welcome to Ponyville, home of Twilight Sparkle, Rainbow Dash, Rarity, Fluttershy, Pinkie Pie, Applejack, and all your other favorite Ponies! Something’s not right in the town though, as some of the inhabitants are acting very, very strange! It’s up to the this group of friends to find the source of the weirdness before it’s too late! Collects My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic issues #1-4.
